title: Cocotb VPI: Couldn't find root handle
body:
### Problem
This test works fine with https://github.com/antmicro/cocotb-verilator-build and I'm able to access `dut.b1.a.value`. But on the latest verilator and cocotb, this test fails.

### HDL
```systemverilog
interface Bus;
    logic [7:0] a;
    logic b [7:0];

    modport src (output a, input b);
    modport snk (input a, output b);
endinterface

module t(
    input i_clk
);

    Bus b1();

endmodule
```

### Error
```
    PYTHONPATH=/home/nndurj/Dev/scratch/cocotb-verilator-build/cocotb/examples/sv_interface_test/tests/build/libs/x86_64:/home/nndurj/Dev/scratch/cocotb-verilator-build/cocotb/examples/sv_interface_test/tests:/home/nndurj/Dev/scratch/cocotb-verilator-build/cocotb/examples/sv_interface_test/tests/../model:/home/nndurj/miniconda3/envs/cocotb/lib/python3.7/site-packages:/home/nndurj/Dev/scratch/cocotb-verilator-build/cocotb/examples/sv_interface_test/tests/../model: LD_LIBRARY_PATH=/home/nndurj/Dev/scratch/cocotb-verilator-build/cocotb/examples/sv_interface_test/tests/build/libs/x86_64 LD_LIBRARY_PATH=/home/nndurj/Dev/scratch/cocotb-verilator-build/cocotb/examples/sv_interface_test/tests/build/libs/x86_64::/home/nndurj/miniconda3/envs/cocotb/lib:/home/nndurj/miniconda3/envs/cocotb/lib:/home/nndurj/miniconda3/envs/cocotb/lib:/home/nndurj/miniconda3/envs/cocotb/lib MODULE=test \
        TESTCASE= TOPLEVEL=t TOPLEVEL_LANG=verilog COCOTB_SIM=1 \
        sim_build/t 
     -.--ns INFO     cocotb.gpi                                  gpi_embed.c:78   in set_program_name_in_venv        Did not detect Python virtual environment. Using system-wide Python interpreter
     -.--ns INFO     cocotb.gpi                                GpiCommon.cpp:104  in gpi_print_registered_impl       VPI registered
     0.00ns INFO     cocotb.gpi                                  gpi_embed.c:340  in embed_sim_init                  Running on Verilator version 4.027 devel
     0.00ns INFO     cocotb.gpi                                  gpi_embed.c:341  in embed_sim_init                  Python interpreter initialized and cocotb loaded!
     0.00ns INFO     cocotb                                      __init__.py:138  in _initialise_testbench           Running tests with cocotb v1.3.0 from /home/nndurj/miniconda3/envs/cocotb/lib/python3.7/site-packages
     0.00ns INFO     cocotb                                      __init__.py:155  in _initialise_testbench           Seeding Python random module with 1578967532
     0.00ns INFO     cocotb.gpi                                  VpiImpl.cpp:416  in get_root_handle                 Nothing visible via VPI
     0.00ns ERROR    cocotb.gpi                                GpiCommon.cpp:262  in gpi_get_root_handle             No root handle found
Traceback (most recent call last):
  File "/home/nndurj/miniconda3/envs/cocotb/lib/python3.7/site-packages/cocotb/__init__.py", line 175, in _initialise_testbench
    regression_manager.initialise()
  File "/home/nndurj/miniconda3/envs/cocotb/lib/python3.7/site-packages/cocotb/regression.py", line 128, in initialise
    self._root_name)
AttributeError: Can not find Root Handle (t)
     0.00ns ERROR    cocotb.gpi                                  gpi_embed.c:425  in embed_sim_init                  cocotb initialization failed - exiting
     0.00ns ERROR    cocotb.scheduler                            __init__.py:198  in _sim_event                      Failing test at simulator request before test run completion: Simulator shutdown prematurely


```
### Test attached
[sv_interface_test.tar.gz](https://github.com/verilator/verilator/files/4056977/sv_interface_test.tar.gz)

### Question

@wsnyder is it possible to use `/*verilator public_flat_rw @(<edge_list>) */` on interface an instance, something like this
```systemverilog
Bus b1 () /*verilator public_flat_rw @(posedge i_clk or negedge i_clk) */ ;

```
